Name: FScrollBoxStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SScrollBox

Variables.Name: TopShadowBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the top shadow of a scrollbox

Variables.Name: BottomShadowBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the bottom shadow of a scrollbox
